description: M1-optimized self-hosted backend. Rebuild from Sapphire → FastAPI + MLX

zones.name: Backend Architecture
zones.belief: Core backend launch, configuration, and settings. Foundation for Phase 1-4 refactor.

zones.name: Continuity & Data
zones.belief: Persistent state: conversation traces, memory, journal entries. Critical for Phase 2 migration.

zones.name: Seed Pack & Prompts
zones.belief: Persona, prompt presets, toolsets. Portable between backends.

zones.name: Documentation
zones.belief: User-facing and operational docs. Must track rebuild progress and migration guide.

features.name: M1-optimized self-hosted backend
features.description: Rebuild from Sapphire to FastAPI, move off external drive, optimize for M1 (mlx-whisper)

phases.name: Scaffold & Chat
phases.description: FastAPI app, web UI mount, Claude integration working

phases.name: Continuity Migration
phases.description: Port memory/traces from Sapphire JSON → SQLite, data migration

phases.name: Scheduler & Plugins
phases.description: APScheduler for tasks/journal, reasoning-trace plugin, final testing
